mapper.update: update payment_offline_collection_match set match_status = 'CONFIRMED', confirmed_time = #{confirmedTime}, confirmed_by = #{confirmedBy}, confirmed_by_name = #{confirmedByName}, updated_by = #{confirmedBy}, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and bank_statement_item_id = #{bankStatementItemId} and del_flag = 0 and match_status = 'MATCHED_PENDING_CONFIRM'
